author: mmusich
body:
### PR Description

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51396
Title says it all.

### PR Validation
Run successfully using the new files in `CMSSW_17_0_X_2026-07-01-2300`:

```
scram b runtests_TestDQMOnlineClient-ecalgpu_dqm_sourceclient
scram b runtests_TestDQMOnlineClient-hcalgpu_dqm_sourceclient
scram b runtests_TestDQMOnlineClient-pfgpu_dqm_sourceclient
scram b runtests_TestDQMOnlineClient-pixelgpu_dqm_sourceclient
```
title: Update `streamDQMGPUvsCPU` files for `CMSSW_17_0_X_2026-07-01-2300` layout
